safest_plan.entry_basis: 1M demand zone 14.10 drawn on both May 2025 charts (zero_live 05-14 '13-14 zone / 1M demand' and 05-26 'may pull to 1M demand 14.10 for optimal spot entry'). NOTE: stale — LINK ran to ~19.5 by Oct 2025, so this sits far below market and is not a live entry today.

targets.basis: zero_live 2025-05-14: key high / MSS confirmation level (already reached by Oct 2025)
zero_live 2025-05-26: major take-profit (effectively reached; LINK ~19.5 Oct 2025)

safest_plan.stop_basis: Below the 2W demand zone (0.705 level ~12.85 on both charts); a daily close under it breaks the bullish demand structure both May calls were built on.

stance_by_source.summary: Passing 'weak' mention with no Chainlink levels — the chart shown was actually Dogecoin; LINK only appears in the watchlist near 19.5.
Buy Chainlink as spot; ideally wait for a dip into the 14.10 1M-demand zone, aiming for 16.35, 17-18, then 20.
Patient dip-buy: prefer a pullback into the high-13s/14 demand area, or reclaim of 15.99 first; target 17.65 and higher.

conflicts: The newest mention (2025-10-13) is labelled LINK but its chart is actually Dogecoin and carries no Chainlink levels, so it provides no current setup — only a watchlist read of LINK near 19.50.

Both May 2025 buy plans have effectively played out: their targets (17.65 up to 20) were reached by October 2025, so the entry levels (13-14 / 14.10) are now stale and sit well below market — there is no fresh actionable setup.

Text vs chart on 2025-05-26: the entry phrased as '0.75-0.79 fib zone' refers to fib ratios (0.705/0.79), which on the chart map to a ~16.4-16.8 retrace area, not dollar prices; the real high-confidence shared entry both calls draw is the 1M demand at ~13.77-14.10.
plain_english: Two analyses from May 2025 both said the same thing: buy Chainlink on a dip into the 13-14 dollar support area and aim for roughly 17.65 up to 20. Those targets were reached — by October 2025 Chainlink was already trading around 19.50, so the old buy levels now sit far below the current price. The only newer mention (October) was a throwaway reference with no new plan, and the chart shown alongside it was actually Dogecoin, not Chainlink. There is no fresh trade here: don't chase, and wait for a genuinely new setup before acting.
